initiatives.name: Server Replacement
initiatives.summary: Replace aging server hardware and refresh warranty coverage.

initiatives.name: Cloud Migration
initiatives.summary: Migrate core workloads to cloud infrastructure with minimal downtime.

initiatives.name: Network Refresh
initiatives.summary: Upgrade switching, firewall, and wireless to modern standards.

initiatives.name: Email Security Upgrade
initiatives.summary: Deploy enhanced email security controls and phishing protection.

initiatives.name: Backup & DR Modernization
initiatives.summary: Modernize backup strategy and validate disaster recovery readiness.

meetings.title: Q1 2026 Business Review & Strategic Planning
meetings.agenda: Review Q1 performance metrics, discuss strategic initiatives, align on Q2-Q3 roadmap, and address any blockers.

meetings.title: IT Infrastructure & Network Assessment
meetings.agenda: Evaluate current network topology, identify capacity constraints, review security posture, and plan upgrade recommendations.

meetings.title: Security Posture & Compliance Review
meetings.agenda: Audit security controls, review compliance status, discuss threat landscape, and define remediation priorities.

meetings.title: 3-Year Technology Roadmap Planning
meetings.agenda: Outline technology strategy for next 3 years, prioritize modernization initiatives, and establish KPIs for success.

meetings.title: IT Budget Planning & ROI Analysis
meetings.agenda: Review IT spending trends, analyze ROI on previous investments, present budget request for next fiscal year.
